title: Greetings 问候
scene: 两个同学在上学路上相遇，互相打招呼。

lines.en: Good morning, Tom! How are you?
I'm fine, thank you. And you?
I'm great. It's a beautiful day today.
Yes, it is. The sun is shining.
Yes, I have all my books. Let me help you with your bag.
lines.zh: 准备好了，我的书都带齐了。让我帮你拿书包吧。

lines.en: Thanks, Tom! You are so kind.
OK! I hope we have a good day at school.
lines.zh: 好的！希望我们在学校度过愉快的一天。
